content:
## Tender: 5bcc3385-20251230-001

**Status:** complete
**Confidence:** 8/10

### Summary
Implemented citation linking system using remark plugin. Citations like [1] are now clickable and jump to reference section. Zero-dependency solution, works with Astro static build. Tested on tickly-cough.md. Includes complete documentation.
